ID_FOUNDER.description: Self-view as an autonomous creator and business owner.

ID_EMPLOYEE.description: Self-view as a structured team member prioritizing stability.

V_FIN_SECURITY.description: Prioritization of predictable income and avoidance of financial ruin.

V_GROWTH.description: Prioritization of learning, scaling, and market impact over comfort.

F_FAILURE.description: Anxiety about public embarrassment or losing capital.

F_STAGNATION.description: Anxiety about being trapped in a repetitive, unfulfilling role.

G_MVP_LAUNCH.description: Concrete objective to release a minimum viable product.

G_PROMOTION.description: Concrete objective to achieve higher corporate status.
